productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed Ivory Tshirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and cuffs in contrast colour, and distressed graphic print with applique on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The graphic print on the front pays tribute to classic fashion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
